blended.narrative: Sommet Saint-Sauveur is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 4.0 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 3,005 ft. Looking ahead, 18 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tuesday: 2.6" of snow, highs of 48°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 3.1" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 6" of snow, highs of 22°F. Expect powder.
